title: EWADeepThinkerResult
description: Derived recommendations from the Deep Thinker agent identifying cross-domain patterns that imply concrete actions not captured by the specialist agents.

supplemental_findings.description: Derived recommendations identified through cross-domain analysis.

finding_id.description: ID with prefix DT-, e.g. DT-01.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the derived finding.

domain.description: The most relevant domain for this finding.

finding.description: The cross-domain condition or pattern observed across specialist outputs.

rationale.description: Explanation of why the combined evidence implies this action is needed.

recommendation.description: The concrete action recommended based on the cross-domain pattern.
